title: Glory be to God
firstLine: Glory be to God the Father,
publicDomainBasis: Horatius Bonar (1808–1889), Henry Thomas Smart (1813–1879). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Glory be to God the Father,
Glory be to God the Son,
Glory be to God the Spirit,
Great Jehovah, Three in One!
As it was, is now, and shall be
While the endless ages run.
